title: Sea Monsters Mahjong
description: Dive into Sea Monsters Mahjong, an underwater twist on the classic game. Match sea monster tiles strategically—remember, you can only draw tiles that are on top of a stack with no blocks on their sides. Explore the depths, revealing krakens, dolphins, and mermaids. With easy controls and oceanic vibes, enjoy a relaxing Mahjong experience with charming sea creatures.
instructions: Use a mouse or touchpad to select the tiles and make a match
